purpose: Beat This ONNX chunk model input/output contract for EternalLoop AnalysisEngine
notes: This contract exports the Beat This frame model, not File2Beats and not audio decoding.
C# preprocessing must reproduce Beat This log-mel spectrograms before feeding this model.
C# postprocessing must convert logits to beat/downbeat times in later phases.
Generated ONNX files must not be committed until licensing and packaging are explicitly approved.
